_publications._publicationTitle: A single-cell atlas of Schwannoma across genetic backgrounds and anatomic locations.

_contextSnippet: The Smart-Seq2 protocol was chosen as it allows for sensitive detection of a high number of genes per cell. In addition, our experimental approach, which included cell sorting for viable tumor and TME cells, allowed us to minimize the incidence of doublets and enrich for neoplastic cells.
details: Allowed for sensitive detection of a high number of genes per cell and retained 11,434 cells after stringent quality controls from 22 schwannoma samples
